name: NEUROONE MEDICAL TECHNOLOGIES Corp
business: NeuroOne is a medical technology company focused on diagnostic, ablation, and deep brain stimulation technology for brain-related conditions such as epilepsy and Parkinson's disease, as well as ablation and stimulation for pain management and drug delivery. The company has received FDA 510(k) clearance for four devices: Evo Cortical, Evo sEEG, OneRF Brain Ablation System, and OneRF TN Ablation System. It has a distribution agreement with Zimmer, which commercializes and distributes the Evo Cortical, Evo sEEG, and OneRF Brain Ablation System in the brain.
sellsTo: Patients with epilepsy, trigeminal neuralgia, chronic back pain, Parkinson's disease, essential tremors, dystonia

exposures.sentence: Evo cortical electrode technology for temporary (less than 30 days) recording, monitoring, and stimulation on the surface of the brain

Evo sEEG Electrode technology for temporary (less than 30 days) use with recording, monitoring, and stimulation equipment for the recording, monitoring, and stimulation of electrical signals at the subsurface level of the brain.
Our OneRF Brain Ablation System is indicated for creation of radiofrequency lesions in nervous tissue for functional neurosurgical procedures.

Our OneRF Trigeminal Nerve Ablation System is indicated for use in procedures to create radiofrequency lesions for the treatment of pain, or for lesioning nerve tissue for functional neurosurgical procedures.

We are also researching and developing the capability to create a new type of combination device based on our sEEG electrode technology to deliver drugs or gene or cell therapies while having the ability to record brain activity before, during, and after delivery.
Our SCS solution utilizes a percutaneously-placed thin-film paddle electrode to deliver precise electrical stimulation to the spinal cord, blocking pain signals and providing relief to patients.
Basivertebral Nerve Ablation (BVNA) : This system would target the basiverterbal nerve to address lower back pain and improve function.

catalysts.event: FDA 510(k) clearance for OneRF TN Ablation System
catalysts.sentence: On August 15, 2025 we received FDA 510(k) clearance to market its OneRF Trigeminal Nerve Ablation System for use in procedures to create radiofrequency lesions for the treatment of pain, or for lesioning nerve tissue for functional neurosurgical procedures.

catalysts.event: Limited market release of OneRF TN Ablation System
catalysts.sentence: We initiated a limited market release of the OneRF TN Ablation System in December 2025.
We established an advisory board for our BVNA development program in October 2025.

catalysts.event: Zimmer Distribution Agreement amendment for OneRF
catalysts.sentence: On October 25, 2024, we entered into the Zimmer Amended and Restated Distribution Agreement (the Amendment ) with Zimmer, Inc. ( Zimmer ) pursuant to which we granted Zimmer the exclusive right and license to distribute our OneRF Ablation System for an upfront payment of $3.0 million

tamClaims.claim: Epilepsy costs the United States $15.5 billion per year
tamClaims.sentence: The CDC and CURE also estimate that epilepsy costs the United States $15.5 billion per year.

tamClaims.claim: Global SCS market approximately $2.5 to $3 billion
tamClaims.sentence: The global market for SCS is substantial, with an estimated value of approximately $2.5 to $3 billion.

tamClaims.claim: BVNA market approximately $100 million per year
tamClaims.sentence: We believe the total market for BVNA procedures currently performed in the United States is approximately $100 million per year ( 10,000 procedures per year), and growing rapidly.

tamClaims.claim: Preclinical drug delivery research market greater than $50 million
tamClaims.sentence: We believe the market for the preclinical research in drug development is greater than $50 million.

tamClaims.claim: Full commercial opportunity for drug delivery potentially over $1 billion
tamClaims.sentence: We believe the full market commercial opportunity for this type of application to be potentially over $1 billion.
